title: Early May Thoughts 2022 — Kaisa, Crew Pairing Off, OSU Solitude
html:
TL;DR

  • May 2022 confessional from Yahir's Austin Hall 4th-floor OSU dorm: a week of preparation around a hoped-for Kaisa encounter that didn't happen — outfit picked (brown corduroy pants), Snapmap-stalking acknowledged, -style stream-of-consciousness as release.
  • Names the odd ball out dynamic explicitly for the first time: Ayden, Riley, and Owen all paired off "as of recently" — Yahir is the single one in the core friend group, and feeling the un-balance.
  • Captures the tension between party-as-fun and party-as-futility: "those people are not going to make it" — Yahir's first explicit articulation of the grind vs distraction axis that hardens by 2025 Austin.
  • Surfaces the making it definition Yahir was operating with at 19: "having a bag... money... something where you can flex and be tied to your name." This is pre-Rankett, pre-Brotein, pre-China — money + name as pure ambition currency.
  • The Fabian reference ("don't force anything, if it's meant to be it'll happen, but that doesn't mean zero effort") is one of the earliest peer-wisdom attributions in the corpus.

Core content

This note is one of the cleanest specimens of the writing as feeling exit pattern — Yahir explicitly says "writing this is maybe cringe but it's lowkey relieving to just spew." The form is functioning as emotional pressure release exactly as it does years later in Austin.

The Kaisa thread itself is minor — "I have put some thought and energy in the 'concept' of Kaisa but everything else regarding her is non-existent" — Yahir is honest that the obsession is mostly self-generated. What's load-bearing is the third-person observation: he watches himself routing through West campus and crossing Weatherford to manufacture a spontaneous encounter, then catches the irony in real time.

The making-it / partying tension shows up here in its pre-Austin form: "making it involves grinding while concurrently avoiding the distracted lifestyles." This is the same axis that becomes no runway discipline in 2025 — same operating system, much higher stakes.

Stub-promotion notes

  • fabian — STUB (entity, peer/wisdom-source — first named here, queue for promotion if 2nd mention surfaces)
  • kaisa — queued to potential entities (single-doc crush, no surname, no ongoing thread)
  • austin hall — queued to potential entities (OSU building reference)

Connections

  • osu — location
  • corvallis or — city
  • ayden, owen davis — friend group
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — synthesis arc; this is an early data point
  • voluntary adversity as philosophy — early grinding-vs-partying tension
  • — same writing-form (Google Doc here, but identical impulse)

related.label: IRL Lore — full PRD for AI-coauthored personal-narrative journal app
There's a recurring theme in your writing you haven't named yet — writing-as-feeling-exit
